name: Punish your cheating stepmom?
description: Laura, your stepmom, tried to cheat on your father by going on dating apps. Ben, the guy she met on the app, was pissed that Laura lied about being single, and wants to punish Laura for her lies. Here is where the story gets murky. Laura says this is the first time she ever cheated on your dad, while Ben says Laura's online dating profile has been active for years and she told him some pretty disgusting fetishes, that her being some innocent girl cheating "only once" is bullshit. Laura says she will never do it again, while Ben says a woman as sexually addicted as her can only be rehabilitated with dire punishment, with him slapping her ass. Do you save your stepmother? Or do you help her get "better"?
creator: VRCat
